matches.title: Matches
matches.noGroupLeagueTitle: You don't have a group yet, so no leagues to show.
matches.noGroupLeagueCta: Join a group to see matches.
matches.favBanner: Set your favorite team in your profile!

matchDetail.noTip: You didn't submit a prediction for this match
matchDetail.oddsSource: Polymarket market estimate for match outcome
matchDetail.oddsConfidence1: Very few votes on this match
matchDetail.insightsRevealError: Could not reveal, please try again

myStats.title: My Stats
myStats.emptyState: You haven't predicted any matches yet!

groups.title: Groups
groups.emptyState: You haven't joined any groups yet.

inviteError.notFound: This invite link is no longer valid.
inviteError.inactive: This invite link is no longer active.
inviteError.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this group.

groupDetail.removeMemberDialog: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
groupDetail.inviteRegenerateDialog: Are you sure you want to regenerate the invite code? The old code will no longer work.
groupDetail.scoringDesc: If set, the group leaderboard will use this scoring system instead of the global default.
groupDetail.favDesc: When active, points earned on your favorite team's matches count double on the group leaderboard.
groupDetail.leagueDesc: Only matches from the selected league will be included in the group leaderboard.
groupDetail.globalTypesDesc: Enable the ones members can predict.
groupDetail.globalTypesEmpty: No official special prediction types available.
groupDetail.customTypesDesc: Create custom special predictions for your group (e.g. Golden Boot, Best Team).
groupDetail.customTypesEmpty: No custom special prediction types yet.
groupDetail.typeDeleteDialog: Are you sure you want to delete this special prediction type?
groupDetail.deleteGroupDesc: The group and its leaderboard will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
groupDetail.specialTabEmpty: No special predictions in this group yet.
groupDetail.myPredEmpty: No evaluated predictions in this group yet.

profile.title: Profile
profile.favDesc: Pick a favorite team per league. Locks after the league's first match kicks off.
profile.favEmpty: You're not a member of any group yet. Join a group to set up your favorite team.

onboarding.step0Title: Welcome to the World Cup Prediction Game!
onboarding.step0Desc: Predict the 2026 World Cup matches, earn points, and find out who really knows football best.
onboarding.step1Desc: Submit or change your prediction any time before kickoff. You earn points for exact scores, correct goal difference, or just picking the winner.
onboarding.step2Desc: Create your own group or join one with an invite code. Each group has its own leaderboard and rivals.

donation.title: Enjoying the game?
donation.desc: This predictor is built as a passion project for the community. If you're having fun, a small contribution helps keep it running.

landing.heroTitle1: Predict the World Cup with your friends.
landing.heroDesc: Predict every World Cup match and watch a live leaderboard reveal who actually knows football — no manual scorekeeping required.
landing.heroSuccess: You're on the list! We'll notify you when we launch.
landing.howDesc: No spreadsheets, no complicated sign-up. Just predict, score, and compete.
landing.howStep1Desc: Sign in with Google, name your group, and invite friends with a single link.
landing.howStep2Desc: Group stage, Round of 16, the Final — every match is open for predictions until kickoff.
landing.howStep3Desc: Points are calculated automatically. See who's winning in real time.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
landing.featuresDesc: Just predictions, points, and friendly competition.
landing.feature1Desc: Create separate groups for friends, family, and coworkers. Each gets its own leaderboard.
landing.feature2Desc: Points update within seconds of the final whistle. No manual calculations.
landing.feature3Desc: Forgot to predict? You'll get a reminder before the window closes.
landing.feature4Desc: Real-time standings per group. Track your position match by match.
landing.persona1Quote: "Last time we used a spreadsheet. Never again."
landing.persona1Desc: Share a link and everyone can predict. No app download, no sign-up wall.
landing.persona2Quote: "Instead of a Friday Slack thread, we have a leaderboard now."
landing.persona2Desc: No IT support needed. Sign in with Google and you're set.
landing.scoringDesc: You don't have to nail the exact score — picking the right winner still earns points.
landing.communityCount: people have already joined the waitlist.
landing.communityJoin: Join them before the World Cup kicks off.
landing.faq1A: Nothing. Completely free, no hidden fees.
landing.faq2Q: Do I need to download anything?
landing.faq2A: No. It runs in your browser on any device.
landing.faq3Q: How big can a group be?
landing.faq3A: No limit. Works for 5 friends or a 200-person office league.
landing.faq4Q: What if I miss a match?
landing.faq4A: You get 0 points for that match, but the rest of your predictions still count.
landing.faq5A: We open a few weeks before the World Cup. Sign up to be the first to know.
landing.footerCtaSuccess: You're on the list! We'll notify you when we launch.
landing.footerCtaDisclaimer: Free forever. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.
landing.footerCopyright: 2025-2026 World Cup Prediction Game. Not affiliated with FIFA.
landing.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

tournamentTips.title: Tournament Tips
tournamentTips.description: Tournament-wide special tips. Your tip counts for the entire tournament.
tournamentTips.noAccess: Tournament tips are only available if you're a member of a World Cup group. Join or create one to access them.
tournamentTips.empty: No tournament-wide tips yet. They'll show up here as soon as they're available.
tournamentTips.tabEmpty: No tips in this category yet.

upsetSpecial.instruction: Pick exactly {max} teams you think will NOT advance from the group stage.

groupStandings.intro: Predict the final standings for all 12 groups (positions 1–4), then pick the 8 best 3rd-placed teams that advance.
groupStandings.infoCard: Predict all 12 group orderings (A–L). You can start with any group. Once all are done, pick your qualifying 3rd-place teams.
groupStandings.best3rdInstruction: Pick {n} teams from the 3rd-placed teams that will advance.
groupStandings.best3rdEmpty: No 3rd-placed teams available — finish the groups first.
groupStandings.best3rdRemaining: You still need to pick {n} more team(s).

bracketProgression.intro: Pick the winner of every match in the knockout bracket.
bracketProgression.infoCard: Pick the winner of each match. Pairings come from your group-standings tip. Winners advance automatically to the next round.
bracketProgression.lockedUpstream: Fill in the previous round first.
bracketProgression.lockedGroupStandings: Fill in the Group Standings tip first.
bracketProgression.gateBody: Fill in the Group Standings tip first — Last 32 pairings are derived from your group orderings + qualifying 3rd-place teams.
bracketProgression.orphanToast: Your group-standings tip changed — {n} winner picks were cleared.
